task_updates.executor_notes: Rebuilt `BulkClipPanel` into a tabbed bulk editor matching the single-clip structure, with mixed-value placeholders, bulk timing/position/audio/text controls, shared custom-effect gating, and deep-patch handling for nested effect/text edits verified by TypeScript.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: All bulk effect selects use `onChangeDeep`, and each patch factory preserves per-clip nested fields through `meta.entrance?.duration`, `meta.exit?.duration`, or `meta.continuous?.intensity`; the shared custom-effect editor uses the same deep-patch pattern.
